description: VERIFIED LIVE: Al Jazeera via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Al Jazeera renders story cards as article.article-card with a semantic h2 headline, so this tool reads them straight from the DOM of your open Al Jazeera tab. Navigate the tab to aljazeera.com/news or any section and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 10 stories with headline, article url and excerpt extracted correctly.

tools.name: aljazeera_headlines
tools.description: Story cards on the current Al Jazeera page (aljazeera.com/news or any section/topic). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each story's headline, article url and excerpt. VERIFIED (10 stories).
